submitted_by: Head of Digital, Gulf Horizon Properties
raw_request: We own a portfolio of commercial towers in Dubai and Abu Dhabi valued at roughly AED 1.2 billion. We want to tokenize a first tranche of three buildings so regional and international investors can buy fractional ownership. We need a compliance-aware architecture, a digital investor onboarding flow with KYC, secondary transfers, automated rental-income distribution, and integration with our existing Yardi property-management system. Timeline is aggressive: we want a pilot live within one quarter and we are concerned about UAE regulation and data residency.
stated_constraints: Must integrate with existing Yardi property-management system
Investor data should stay within UAE where possible
Board wants a clear view of regulatory exposure before approving
budget_signal: Mid-to-large enterprise engagement; budget not finalized
